title: .phase-status.json
description: Canonical schema for the shared migration state file (.phase-status.json) that DSL-driven migration skills read and advance. The valid phase NAMES are NOT enumerated here — they are whatever phases the skill declares (its phase files). This schema is skill-agnostic: adding a phase to a skill requires no change to this file.

migration_id.description: Matches the $MIGRATION_DIR folder name (e.g. 0226-1430). Set at creation; never changes.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp; updated after each phase-status change.

current_phase.description: The phase to run next: a declared phase name, or the 'complete' terminal. Optional but recommended; when present it is authoritative for phase selection.

phases.description: One entry per phase the skill declares (backbone and checkpoint). Keys are the skill's phase names — this schema does not enumerate them.

additionalProperties.description: Phase status. Progresses pending -> in_progress -> completed and never goes backward, except a confirmed re-entry reset (see INTERPRETER.md § _re_entry_guard). At most one backbone phase is in_progress at a time.
